metadata.source: Product Manual 2023 and Crop Calendar Ver 3.0 June 2026 and Crop Calendar Ver 3.0 June 2026

Product: SVTD8323

Suitable for truss/cluster and loose harvests

Pungency: High (>80K SHU)

Product: Jalapeno (SV3198HJ)

Product: Koshi Hot

Product: Chevalier

Days to 1st Harvest: 36-38 days after sowing
Parthenocarpic winter cucumber

Product: RS03602833
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety

Strong parthenocarpic hybrid; high yielding; attractive green fruits; high spine density

Product: PS64

Product: Jamini

Product: Gulmohar

Product: BUSHY BEANS

Crop: Beans
Segment: Bushy

Product: SVOK1408

Crop: Okra
Days to First Harvest: 45-47 days
Maturity: 40-45 days after sowing
Fruit Length: 12-14 cm
Tolerance to OELCV & YVMV: Good

Product: SVOK1509
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Okra
Plant Habit: Semi Dwarf
Maturity: 45-50 days after sowing
Fruit Length: 12-14 cm

Product: Apoorva
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Watermelon
Big watermelon with high productivity

Product: Sugarpack

Dark red flesh with high sugar content

Product: Khaas

Product: Dilkash

Product: Harihar
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Eggplant

Product: Manjari
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Eggplant

Product: SVKT0028
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Eggplant

Product: Jhalari
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Bitter Gourd

Product: Abhishek
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Bitter Gourd

Product: Sharada
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Bottle Gourd

Product: Neela
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Ridge Gourd

Product: SVKP5112
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Sponge Gourd
Fruit Length: 30-35 cm
Fruit Weight: 150-180 g
Days to 1st Harvest: 45-50 days after sowing
Very good disease package; attractive marketable fruit quality

Product: SV6881SN
Category: Vegetable Seed Variety
Crop: Sweet Corn
Plant Height: 150-160 cm
Maturity: 70-75 days after sowing
Cob Length: 18-20 cm
TSS: 12-13%
Early maturity, more rows per cob, sweet taste

Product: Emesto Prime
Category: Fungicide (Seed Treatment)
Active Ingredient: Penflufen 240 FS (22.43% w/w)
Purpose: Seed treatment for potato; controls black scurf (Rhizoctonia) and soil-borne pathogens.
Mode of Action: SDHI fungicide; inhibits succinate dehydrogenase in fungal mitochondria.
More marketable yield and better tuber quality
Excellent protection against black scurf
Spotless, shiny, even-sized potatoes

Product: EverGol Xtend
Category: Fungicide (Seed Treatment)
Active Ingredient: Penflufen 15.4% + Trifloxystrobin 15.4% FS
Purpose: Fungicidal seed treatment against seed and seedling rot in groundnut, soybean, cotton, Bengal gram.
Mode of Action: Dual SDHI + QoI (strobilurin) action on fungal respiration.
Broad spectrum disease control
Better emergence and crop stand
Improved vigour and root system

Product: Gaucho
Category: Insecticide (Seed Treatment)
Active Ingredient: Imidacloprid 600 FS (48% w/w)
Purpose: Seed treatment against early-season sucking pests (aphids, jassids, thrips, whiteflies, shoot fly, termites).
Mode of Action: Neonicotinoid; antagonist to nicotinic acetylcholine receptors.
30-40 days protection from sowing
IPM friendly; reduces foliar sprays
Better crop emergence and vigour

Product: Raxil Easy
Category: Fungicide (Seed Treatment)
Active Ingredient: Tebuconazole 0.60 FS (5.36% w/w)
Purpose: Seed treatment for loose smut in wheat; Bakanae foot rot and brown leaf spot in rice.
Mode of Action: Triazole DMI fungicide; inhibits fungal sterol biosynthesis.
Effective at very low dose
Protects seed coat and internal grain
Safe on germinating seeds

Product: Adora
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Bispyribac sodium 100 SC (9.5% w/w)
Purpose: Broad spectrum post-emergent herbicide for rice (nursery and main field).
Mode of Action: Systemic ALS inhibitor; absorbed by foliage and roots.
Controls grasses, sedges and broadleaf weeds
Excellent rice crop selectivity
Flexible 15-20 day spray window; low dose (200-250 ml/ha)

Product: Alion Plus
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Indaziflam 1.65% + Glyphosate 44.63% w/w SC
Purpose: Broad spectrum herbicide for long-term weed control in tea, grapes and horticulture/perennial crops.
Mode of Action: Indaziflam (pre-emergent) + Glyphosate (post-emergent systemic).
Foliar and pre-emergence control
Long-lasting weed-free fields
Effective on resistant weeds

Product: Atlantis
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Mesosulfuron-methyl 3% + Iodosulfuron-methyl sodium 0.6% WG
Purpose: Post-emergent herbicide for grasses, sedges and broadleaf weeds in wheat.
Mode of Action: Sulfonyl urea; inhibits AHAS enzyme.
Excellent Phalaris minor control
Controls broadleaf weeds at 2-4 leaf stage
Flexible application window; long-lasting performance

Product: Council Activ
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Triafamone 20% + Ethoxysulfuron 10% WG
Purpose: Early post-emergence herbicide for grass, sedge and broadleaf weeds in transplanted and direct-seeded rice.
Mode of Action: Dual ALS inhibitors (Triafamone + Ethoxysulfuron).
Applicable in transplanted and wet DSR rice
Controls weeds at 1-2 leaf stage
Wide weed spectrum

Product: Ghasa
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Pyrithiobac Sodium 6% + Quizalofop-ethyl 4% w/w MEC
Purpose: Selective herbicide for broad spectrum weed control in cotton.
Mode of Action: ALS inhibitor + ACCase inhibitor for grasses and broadleaves.
Superior cotton crop safety
Long duration control; one-shot application
Yellowing of weeds within 12 hours

Product: Guletta
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Carfentrazone Ethyl 40% OF (40% w/w)
Purpose: Fast-acting post-emergent contact herbicide for broadleaf weeds and sedges in wheat and direct-seeded rice.
Mode of Action: Aryl triazolinone; destroys cell membranes.
Fast action on tough broadleaf weeds
Selective in wheat and rice

Product: Laudis
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Tembotrione 420 SC (34.4% w/w)
Purpose: Post-emergence herbicide for broadleaf and grassy weeds in maize/corn.
Mode of Action: HPPD inhibitor; causes chlorophyll bleaching.
Broad spectrum weed control in maize
Flexible early-to-late post-emergence window
High crop safety; fast action and rain-fastness

Product: Momiji
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Pyroxasulfone 85% WG
Purpose: Pre-emergence herbicide for wheat, maize and soybean.
Mode of Action: Isoxazoline; inhibits VLCFA biosynthesis.
New mode of action; works on resistant Phalaris minor
Season-long residual weed control
Excellent crop safety

Product: Ricestar
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Fenoxaprop-p-ethyl 6.9 EC (6.7% w/w)
Purpose: Selective post-emergent herbicide for grassy weeds (Echinochloa) in direct-seeded and transplanted rice.
Mode of Action: Inhibits fatty acid synthesis in grass meristem.
Effective grass control
Tank-mix compatible with Sunrice for total weed control
Flexible 3-5 leaf stage application

Product: Roundup
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Glyphosate IPA salt 41% SL
Purpose: Non-selective systemic herbicide for tea, non-cropped areas and rice pre-plant.
Mode of Action: Inhibits EPSPS enzyme in aromatic amino acid pathway.
Broad spectrum; kills roots and shoots
Effective on hard-to-kill and resistant weeds
Low mammalian toxicity

Product: Roundup Speed
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Glyphosate IPA salt 54% SL
Purpose: High-efficacy glyphosate for annual grass and broadleaf weeds in non-cropped areas.
Mode of Action: Non-selective systemic EPSPS inhibitor.
Broad spectrum post-emergent
Controls tough weeds
Safer to soil

Product: Sencor
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Metribuzin 70% WP
Purpose: Pre-emergent/early post herbicide for wheat, potato, soybean, tomato and sugarcane.
Mode of Action: Systemic; inhibits photosynthesis via root and leaf uptake.
Controls Phalaris minor including resistant biotypes
Broad spectrum grasses and broadleaves
Economical low-dose application

Product: Sunrice
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Ethoxysulfuron 15% WG
Purpose: Post-emergence herbicide for broadleaf and sedge weeds in rice.
Mode of Action: Sulfonyl urea ALS inhibitor.
Tank-mix with Ricestar for total rice weed control
Effective on sedges and broadleaves

Product: Whip Super
Category: Herbicide
Active Ingredient: Fenoxaprop-p-ethyl 9% w/v EC (9.3% w/w)
Purpose: Post-emergent herbicide for grassy weeds in soybean, cotton, blackgram, onion, groundnut and rice.
Mode of Action: ACCase inhibitor; absorbed by leaves.
Flexible application window
Broad grassy weed spectrum
Safe to succeeding crops

Product: Admire
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Imidacloprid 70% WG
Purpose: Systemic insecticide for sucking pests in cotton, rice, vegetables and other crops.
Mode of Action: Neonicotinoid; disrupts nervous signal transmission.
World-leading neonicotinoid chemistry
Fast water solubility and uniform spray suspension
Broad spectrum sucking pest control

Product: Alanto
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Thiacloprid 240 SC (21.7% w/w)
Purpose: Neonicotinoid insecticide for broad spectrum pest control.
Mode of Action: Agonist on nicotinic acetylcholine receptors.
Rain-fast stability
Broad spectrum pest control
Low acute mammalian toxicity

Product: Belt Expert
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Flubendiamide 19.92% + Thiacloprid 19.92% w/w SC
Purpose: Combination insecticide for chewing and sucking pests.
Mode of Action: Ryanodine receptor disruptor + neonicotinoid.
Dual mode of action
Broad spectrum chewing and sucking pest control
Plant growth enhancement effect

Product: Confidor
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Imidacloprid 200 SL (17.8% w/w)
Purpose: Systemic neonicotinoid for aphids, jassids, thrips, whiteflies, hoppers and termites.
Mode of Action: Nicotinic acetylcholine receptor antagonist.
Excellent systemic and residual activity
Low toxicity to warm-blooded animals
Usable as spray, soil drench or seed treatment

Product: Decis 100
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Deltamethrin 100 EC (11% w/w)
Purpose: Synthetic pyrethroid for chewing and sucking insects.
Mode of Action: Modifies sodium channel kinetics in insect nerves.
Remarkable knockdown effect
Good residual activity and rain-fastness
Repellent and anti-feeding properties

Product: Fame
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Flubendiamide 480 SC (39.35% w/w)
Purpose: Diamide insecticide for Lepidoptera (fruit borer, stem borer, leaf folder, pod borer).
Mode of Action: Ryanodine receptor activation; disrupts muscle calcium.
Novel mode of action for resistance management
Rapid cessation of feeding
Low dose; long duration control of caterpillars

Product: Glamore
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Ethiprole 40% + Imidacloprid 40% WG
Purpose: Combination insecticide for broad spectrum sucking insects.
Mode of Action: Dual mode: GABA-gated chloride channel blocker + neonicotinoid.
Proven dual-active combination
Effective on chronic sucking pest problems

Product: Jump
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Fipronil 80% WG
Purpose: Phenyl pyrazole insecticide for stem borer and leaf folder in rice.
Mode of Action: Blocks GABA-gated chloride channels.
Very effective on rice stem borer and leaf folder
Minimal environmental impact at recommended use

Product: Lesenta
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Imidacloprid 40% + Fipronil 40% WG
Purpose: Dual-mode insecticide for chronic pest problems.
Mode of Action: Neonicotinoid + phenyl pyrazole combination.
Low dose, highly effective dual action

Product: Movento
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Spirotetramat 150 OD (15.31% w/w)
Purpose: Two-way systemic insecticide for hidden/sucking pests.
Mode of Action: Lipid biosynthesis inhibitor (tetramic acid).
Only modern 2-way systemic (xylem + phloem) insecticide
Long duration control of hidden pests
Shoot-to-root protection

Product: Movento Energy
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Spirotetramat 11.01% + Imidacloprid 11.01% w/w SC
Purpose: Mixed sucking pest management standard.
Mode of Action: Lipid biosynthesis inhibitor + neonicotinoid.
Two-way systemic plus broad sucking pest spectrum

Product: Oberon
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Spiromesifen 240 SC (22.9% w/w)
Purpose: Contact insecticide/acaricide for mites and whitefly.
Mode of Action: Inhibits lipid biosynthesis in mites and whiteflies.
Active against all developmental stages
Long-lasting residual control on vegetables, fruits, cotton, tea

Product: Renkli
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Flonicamid 50% WG
Purpose: Selective feeding blocker for sucking pests including jassids.
Mode of Action: Chordotonal organ TRPV channel modulator.
Immediate protection from damaging sucking pests
Selective on beneficial insects

Product: Solomon
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Beta-cyfluthrin 8.49% + Imidacloprid 19.81% w/w OD
Purpose: Combination contact and systemic insecticide.
Mode of Action: Pyrethroid + neonicotinoid.
Quick knockdown and anti-feeding effects
Broad spectrum

Product: Vayego
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Tetraniliprole 200 SC (18.18% w/w)
Purpose: Diamide insecticide for Lepidoptera.
Mode of Action: Ryanodine receptor modulator.
Effective via ingestion and contact
Wide range of Lepidopteran control

Product: Curbix Pro
Category: Insecticide
Active Ingredient: Ethiprole 10.7% + Pymetrozine 40% w/w WG
Purpose: Dual-mode hopper management in paddy.
Mode of Action: GABA blocker + feeding blocker combination.
Effective broad spectrum hopper control
Effective in all hopper instars

Product: Velum Prime
Category: Fungicide/Nematicide
Active Ingredient: Fluopyram 400 SC (34.48% w/w)
Purpose: Soil and foliar treatment for nematodes and fungal diseases.
Mode of Action: SDHI fungicide/nematicide.
Broad spectrum soil disease and nematode management

Product: Acerbo
Category: Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Fluopyram 21.37% + Trifloxystrobin 21.37% w/w SC
Purpose: Systemic fungicide for leaf/neck blast in rice; powdery mildew and anthracnose in chilli; purple blotch in onion.
Mode of Action: SDHI + QoI combination.
Broad spectrum foliar disease control

Product: Aliette
Category: Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Fosetyl-Al 80% WP
Purpose: Systemic fungicide against Oomycetes (downy mildew).
Mode of Action: True systemic; multi-site action prevents resistance.
Best prophylactic for downy mildew in grapes
No confirmed resistance despite decades of use
Rain-fast systemic absorption

Product: Antracol
Category: Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Propineb 70% WP
Purpose: Contact fungicide for cereals, fruits and vegetables.
Mode of Action: Multi-site contact action on cell membranes.
Broad spectrum disease control
Resistance management via multi-site action
Suitable for IPM programs

Product: Buonos
Category: Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Tebuconazole 430 SC (38.39% w/w)
Purpose: Systemic triazole fungicide with protective, curative and eradicative action.
Mode of Action: DMI fungicide; inhibits ergosterol biosynthesis.
Broad spectrum disease control
Greening effect on crop foliage

Product: Folicur
Category: Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Tebuconazole 250 EC (25.9% w/w)
Purpose: Systemic triazole fungicide for many crops.
Mode of Action: DMI fungicide.
Broad spectrum prophylactic, curative and eradicative action
Plant growth enhancement effect

Product: Infinito
Category: Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Fluopicolide 5.56% + Propamocarb 55.6% w/w SC
Purpose: Systemic fungicide for late blight in potato and downy mildew.
Mode of Action: Novel fluopicolide mode + propamocarb.
Strong translaminar and anti-sporulant activity
Built-in resistance management
Improves potato tuber quality and yield

Product: Luna Experience
Category: Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Fluopyram 17.7% + Tebuconazole 17.7% w/w SC
Purpose: Broad spectrum disease protection beyond standard fungicides.
Mode of Action: SDHI + DMI dual mode of action.
Two modes of action for resistance management
Helps meet food chain quality and export requirements

Product: Melody Duo
Category: Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Iprovalicarb 5.5% + Propineb 61.25% WP
Purpose: Fungicide for downy mildew in grapes and late blight in potato.
Mode of Action: Protective, curative and antisporulant combination.
Highly effective against downy mildew and late blight
Protects young leaves and shoots
Improves quality and disease-free produce at harvest

Product: Nativo
Category: Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Tebuconazole 50% + Trifloxystrobin 25% WG
Purpose: Systemic broad-spectrum fungicide with protective and curative action.
Mode of Action: DMI + QoI combination.
Broad spectrum disease control
Improves crop immunity and yield quality

Product: Profiler
Category: Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Fluopicolide 4.44% + Fosetyl-Al 66.67% WG
Purpose: Downy mildew control in grapes.
Mode of Action: Novel fluopicolide + systemic fosetyl.
Longer duration downy mildew control
Complete systemic, contact and translaminar activity

Product: Rhapsody
Category: Biological Fungicide
Active Ingredient: Bacillus subtilis strain KTSB 1015 1.5% AS
Purpose: Biological fungicide and bactericide; powdery mildew in grapes.
Mode of Action: Indigenous bio-agent colonizes plant surfaces and suppresses pathogens.
Environment-friendly biological control
Soil disease control and plant growth promotion
Foliar and soil application

dosages.method: Seed Treatment (dip tubers for 10 min, dry in shade)
dosages.formulation_dose: 83 ml in 100 litres water per 800 kg seed tubers

dosages.method: Seed Treatment (mix in polythene bag, max 8 ml slurry/kg seed)

dosages.target: Bakanae Foot rot, Brown leaf spot

chunks.application_note: Drain water before spray; refill within 2–3 days; maintain 3–4 cm standing water for 10 days. 80–100 ml per acre.
Use with surfactant Alkyl ether sulphate Na salt (GenaPol LRO fluid) @500 ml/ha. ~160 g/acre.
Apply at 1–2 leaf stage of weeds. ~90 g/acre.
450 ml/acre in 150 litres water. Apply 0–3 days after sowing (rainfed) or 0–3 days after 1st irrigation (irrigated).
25 g/acre (rice). Drain water before spraying. 120 L spray volume per acre.
Use with surfactant @1000 ml/ha. ~115 ml/acre.
Pre-emergence. 60 g/acre.
